# Global Example Prompt

This is a pre-existing global prompt used for testing XDG prompt discovery.
It simulates a user who already has global prompts configured.

## Purpose

Test that `awf init --global` preserves existing prompts when called with --force flag.
Test that existing global prompts are discovered by `awf list prompts`.

Source: global
Path: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/awf/prompts/global-example.md
